events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes rebar placement on a commercial project. The field condition is "missing chairs/supports (mat on dirt)." This is a serious defect because rebar must be supported on chairs/spacers to maintain proper concrete cover and position. ACI 318 and ACI 117 require proper support and cover. Mat on dirt means no chairs/supports, which is non-compliant.

Stage: rough-complete
Percent complete: 70 (as stated, until defects corrected)
Decision: fail (non-compliant, defective)
Risk: high or critical — rebar on dirt means inadequate cover, potential corrosion, structural deficiency. I'd say high.
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Findings: missing chairs/supports, mat resting on dirt, insufficient concrete cover
Actions: install proper chairs/spacers per placing drawings, re-inspect before concrete placement
References: ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings
